description:
DNA, RNA and protein sequence data analysis.


Bug fixes
- Fixed an issue where mouse-based range selection did not work in the cloning editor.
Changes
The bundled Java version is Java 21.0.10, where we use the JRE from the Azul OpenJDK builds.
Advanced notice
- The legacy Workbench policy property 'run_on_workbench_when_server_is_available' will not be supported from version 27.0. The workbench_save_to_server policy property, available since version 25.0, should be used instead.
